introSection: Coccinelle is a steel roller coaster located at Walygator Sud-Ouest in Roquefort, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Coccinelle is French for Ladybird.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Coccinelle is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

fullText:
Coccinelle is a steel roller coaster located at Walygator Sud-Ouest in Roquefort, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Coccinelle is French for Ladybird.

Coccinelle is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

Red track and green supports.
